item.title: Slow Living Without Going Off Grid
item.description: A simple reminder that slow living can fit everyday life, with practical routines that feel calm, realistic, and sustainable.

media:content.media:title: Slow Living Without Going Off Grid
media:content.media:description: A simple reminder that slow living can fit everyday life, with practical routines that feel calm, realistic, and sustainable.

item.title: Convenience Can Add More Work
item.description: A simple look at how convenience can sometimes create extra steps, and how practical routines can help keep everyday life manageable.

media:content.media:title: Convenience Can Add More Work
media:content.media:description: A simple look at how convenience can sometimes create extra steps, and how practical routines can help keep everyday life manageable.

item.title: That Practical Mom on Khloe Kardashian’s Pantry
item.description: That Practical Mom shares a look at Khloe Kardashian’s pantry and why it stands out.

item.title: That Practical Mom: Frozen Veggie Cooking Tip
item.description: That Practical Mom shares a simple tip for cooking frozen vegetables the right way.

media:content.media:title: That Practical Mom: Frozen Veggie Cooking Tip
media:content.media:description: That Practical Mom shares a simple tip for cooking frozen vegetables the right way.
